valid_partitions: gift card covers total payable to zero
cart includes gift card product (coupon applies only to other items)
decision_rules: invalid gift card code -> reject gift card
apply coupon discount to merchandise subtotal excluding gift card products
apply gift card after coupon; gift card can cover shipping and tax
final payable >= 0 must hold; if negative -> reject input/adjust to 0
exception_cases: coupon and gift card applied in wrong order
